title: centaurea × lengyelii
intro: Centaurea × lengyelii, also known as Lengyel's knapweed or Lengyel's star thistle, is a hybrid plant in the Asteraceae family, which is a cross between Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea ruthenica. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea × lengyelii include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × lengyelii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
